name: Individual Berry Cobblers
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
Make pastry stars:
Mix together the egg yolk and water and reserve.
Lightly flour rolling pin and work surface. Roll pastry sheets into a 14x13-inch rectangle. Using star-shaped cutter (any size), cut out 24 stars. Divide evenly, in a single layer, between 2 baking sheets and place in freezer for 5 minutes.
Remove baking sheets from freezer. Brush each pastry star lightly with some egg wash. Bake in the middle and lower third of oven about 5 minutes. To bake evenly, switch baking sheets and continue to bake until stars are puffed and golden brown, about 5-10 more minutes. Transfer to a rack and let cool completely.
Make berry mixture:
In a large bowl whisk together water, lemon juice, and cornstarch until combined well. Add berries and sugar, tossing gently. Divide berry mixture evenly into eight 1 1/2-cup shallow ramekins. Put into two shallow baking pans. Bake berries in the middle and lower thirds of oven for 25 minutes and cool slightly.
Top cobblers with stars and a scoop of ice cream. Serve hot or warm.
